description: Apply a .sql migration script to a local SQLite database in a single pass (destructive).
rules: the SQL comes from SQL_FILE at runtime
SQL_FILE must exist (errors to the applied log + non-zero exit if missing)
usage: Set DB_FILE + SQL_FILE (a .sql path). Applied in one pass; structured output reports the applied log.
limitation: Applies whatever the .sql file contains; no transaction wrapping is imposed by the tool.
